title: An Act Updating References to the United States Internal Revenue Code of 1986 Contained in the Maine Revised Statutes
last_house_action: 4/29/2026 - The Bill was in the possession of the Committee on Taxation when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was placed in the Legislative Files. ( DEAD )

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on December 3, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
The Bill was in the possession of the Committee on Taxation when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was placed in the Legislative Files. ( DEAD )
